title: :bebezwe:
description:
:bebezwe:
a mod that adds an unnecessarily complicated and convoluted crafting tree (with six custom tables) to make an in-joke item
body:
Adds an emoji from the [Laghari Portals](https://www.laghariportals.com/) discord in the form of a throwable item with an extremely and unnecessarily convoluted crafting tree.

Also adds around 30 variants of said emoji, as well as all of [ZeWei](https://www.zewei.xyz/)'s music in the form of music discs.

<small>Thank you to ZeWei, GhostCryptid, KSpacito, LuckyDanCZ, Nosk, Ashley, biangfox, F277f4, kyl3s_c0ast, Masela, WitchHeadStar, Zurui the Scrunkler, br3dcrumbs, OukaMeep, Omaatje, cxerizo, wabi1b, Longzilla, EGaikko, Lemonade Shark, the Lutea System, Lupa Lunaris and Sillie Millie for letting me use your art and/or characters in this very silly mod!! If any of you have a Modrinth account and want to be added as a contributor here lmk</small>
